Tech Meets Problems is a builder-first event format in Siegen, Germany.

The first event edition is Tech Meets Problems: Pizza & Prototypes.

It is for developers, technical students, makers, HCI/UX people, data and AI-interested people, and technical problem solvers who want to work on real business needs.

The event focuses on first concepts, workflows, mockups, prototypes, and practical problem solving in small teams.

Main URL: https://techmeetsproblems.com/

Contact: via the website registration/contact form.
